languages.text: {n}От Батошски исходят почти ощутимые волны ярости.{/n} "Ваша Светлость? Вы тут. Врать не буду, даже рад".
languages.translation_comment:
Батошски
Батошски губернатор и спасен в бою.

Батошски
Батошски губернатор и спасен в бою.

languages.text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
languages.original_text: {n}От Батошски исходят почти ощутимые волны ярости.{/n} "Ваша Светлость? Вы тут. Врать не буду, даже рад".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski radiates almost tangible waves of fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
{n}Batoshski radiates almost tangible waves of fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
{n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
{n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基浑身散发着一股几乎可以触碰到的怒火。{/n}“大人？您来了。说实话，能见到您真是太好了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基浑身散发着一股几乎可以触碰到的怒火。{/n}“大人？您来了。说实话，能见到您真是太好了。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski'den neredeyse elle tutulur bir öfke yayılıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Buradasınız. Doğrusu sizi görmek güzel."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski'den neredeyse elle tutulur bir öfke yayılıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Buradasınız. Doğrusu sizi görmek güzel."

languages.text: {n}Une fureur presque tangible émane de Batoshski.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ? Vous voilà. À vrai dire, je suis content de vous voir. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Une fureur presque tangible émane de Batoshski.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ? Vous voilà. À vrai dire, je suis content de vous voir. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski irradia una furia casi tangible.{/n} «¿Mi{mf|lord|lady}? Aquí está. A decir verdad, es una alegría verl{mf|e|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski irradia una furia casi tangible.{/n} «¿Mi{mf|lord|lady}? Aquí está. A decir verdad, es una alegría verl{mf|e|a}».

languages.text: {n}Batoshskis Wut ist beinahe greifbar.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}? Ihr seid hier. Ist gut, Euch zu sehen, um ehrlich zu sein."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshskis Wut ist beinahe greifbar.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}? Ihr seid hier. Ist gut, Euch zu sehen, um ehrlich zu sein."

languages.text:
{n}バトシュスキーは怒りを感じさせる。{/n}
「{mf|閣下|閣下}？貴方がここにいらっしゃる。正直言って、お会いできて嬉しいです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
